confidence_rationale: Video quality and angle make precise measurement of deviation from marked line difficult. Estimates are based on visible gaps between cut edge and marking, but exact millimeter measurements cannot be reliably determined from this camera angle.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviations at cardinal points due to camera angle and video resolution
Whether gauze remained attached to clamps throughout (clamps not consistently visible)
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with excellent time (57s vs 60-90s expert benchmark) and smooth cutting technique. Video quality limits precise penalty assessment.
strengths: Excellent completion time well within expert range
improvement_suggestions: Maintain even closer adherence to marked line
Consider slower cutting speed for maximum precision if time allows
